title: First Conditional
questions: What will you do if you miss your family and friends?
What will you do if you have problems with the English language?
What will you do if you can't stand the heat?
What will you do if you want to move back to your home country?
What will you do if you fall ill?
What will you do if you run out of money?
What will you do if you get bored?
What will you do if you don't like the food in the UK?
What will you do if you split up with your partner?
What will you do if you feel lonely?
What will you do if your neighbours annoy you?
What will you do if someone phones you during the English lesson?
What will you do if you don't enjoy life in the UK?
What will you do if your friend invites you to the cinema tonight?
What will you do if your purse or wallet is stolen?
What will you do if you get a headache?
What will you do if you it rains at the weekend?
What will you do if you run out of food in your house?
